meaning: n.<美>玉米,<英>谷物,五谷,[医]鸡眼vt.腌(肉等)
examples: There was an old mill that really did grind corn.
The field had been ploughed and planted with corn.
Because it's made from corn, it is both inexpensive and easy on the earth to produce.
African yields rank dead last in every major crop harvested, from corn to cotton.
